Flat concept inventory:
- LLM Safety | papers: 1db819afb3604c4bfd1e5a0cb2ee9ab9dec52642; 17bcb1edbe068e8fe6a97da552c70a77a15bbce7; 399e7d8129c60818ee208f236c8dda17e876d21f; 19443d48399d4fe89a4b0a96917c50c6fd9c5af1; 5d49c7401c5f2337c4cc88d243ae39ed659afe64; 634c083444e11c89f30c93a2986cb43db35ca304; dffe2aef88a3925b249bfe14dd0f8c7645860d64; 9f859726b3d8dffd96a1f55de4122617751cc1b4; 259d07f47c046389d0b4f256139de64736dd9a94; c4ff1be5c254b60b96b7455eefcc4ec9583f82ed; 59c2b4ef91d4ce23cd4f270c8750a00de9054ec2; 8d17234680db76f99efd22fbcb169f45d2d79d93; 2f94f03fdac62d05f0f416b7b3855d1f597afee9; 99eee47dad469790042b973bc7cb40cb63a660b1; 025ca4c125d6ecabc816a56f160e5c992abc76d9; f3f23f7f9f5369aade19f20bc5d028cce7b9c9aa; ac1788e9a168a6455beb6316f316950842297c11; 9716a2876d08fce9d8e5c5ba4d7b1a9af44806d6; ace98e1e58bcc364afbb2feff6d136232f5f47da; f3de6ea08e2464190673c0ec8f78e5ec1cd08642; bfc0e3e651cd4b715272fe68add8a180a112293c; 1104d766527dead44a40532e8a89444d9cef5c65; 6b135e922a0c673aeb0b05c5aeecdb6c794791c6; 5759d7c7038bfb7b5f1d47539c8348b04f5e0ee7; e8b3b37c0d301ea41c75765f6ceb7fcbb2e088a4; 47030369e97cc44d4b2e3cf1be85da0fd134904a; 4637f79ddfaf923ce569996ffa5b6cda1996faa1; 709af143f78bc62413c50ea1a7ee75b0702c4f59; 14e8cf5a5e6a7b35e618b08f5cf06f572b3a54e0; 263a58f4fd32caca1dad2351af4d711aec451fe6; f8a2dca1e8fe56e698984c077f7ff58d8ca867e9; 0429020abad6f22ea17681fa403aa591693bb607; b88535ea9368753c91967bb7e997c06b1ac6aaec; 512b3097ffcd6afcde6b58da1e656d5d9a635678; d1b5151231a790c7a60f620e21860593dae9a1c5; 90de1938a64d117d61b9e7149d2981df49b81433; 598df44f1d21a5d1fe3940c0bb2a6128a62c1c15; 82fe948f18ca0138d035f553286c5e4b712dbdbe; 84b7c486c56bd3880cb8eb01de9ae90ba3ebdaed; 3283764bbbd7084c9e6995e20953dbf36b25a226; a4c921bdef167ae54cc3a40643e6e3ed13d49a61; 9ec29a26336f043a705ac99baa04c8d7f69fe4b4; 0f7308fbcae43d22813f70c334c2425df0b1cce1; 92930ed3560ea6c86d53cf52158bc793b089054d; 163b4d6a79a5b19af88b8585456363340d9efd04; d766bffc357127e0dc86dd69561d5aeb520d6f4c; 0d1c76d45afa012ded7ab741194baf142117c495; 104b0bb1da562d53cbda87aec79ef6a2827d191a; e2e52461194bc81351da7caa978ac42e9e9549cc; 59207e9d0cd4129b6ed665205105192dd3032ff3; b574245f3db22b5eb7fe64bd8b0a147dab467b60; 2cdd5c3dc42c0df40bc8839709869af3560d4bfe; e92e8ff1becb9a9e4a7dd09878eaacb2a62ffb6b; b8b8d5655df1c6a71bbb713387863e34cc055332; c1d1842e08716cbf7250167969522a1705d8bcd3; 3e30a7ac4886b28eb50151f58e14a1d698cccd0e; 1ab91d6ac7afc1a0121487a9089fa70edc1634d4; 8cf9b49698fdb1b754df2556576412a7b44929f6; 6fa338adac35e556e49cbb6020f13dcef4956a74; 098370508aaf56f718a472511987ac2072d0f917; 1b220b8d9e43035e334ea16e36a2685a1d092b88; 972706306f85b1bfb40c7d35c796ad5174eb0c9c; b5a624da64475d735f0e298dc6f2f6669b5bb697; b69aa32ee52f5efe8e3196114581ac610da8a2b2; e39b586e561b36a3b71fa3d9ee7cb15c35d84203; ecdfc556828dc59d8a0009016fcbe97a06cf7e23; 3fa4d63e0194cdbd909c579456830e0a7c909242; 6f35b070c250507dbec8a7365cf01b25eb66d792; ea07b2e1a910defdcac01a47a152b6ad87e02ed4; da89cdeb0014666f4024f797d0c67cd45d92a7c9; 382ba0c4452aab6ecdaf8a62d567bb3c4684e4f0; 66af295963d35a203281b4e7bb902028d1c63077; 77d956cdab4508d569ae5741549b78e715fd0749; 0794333779d775abc2053052d1e7009066cbd4f1; 041c4a3932eae3931d90b1a0fc033cf5f491c267; 9b9a4fa3ed510fc6eb1bf831979235f3d9f8b556; 60b05f32c32519a809f21642ef1eb3eaf3848008; d7da009f457917aa381619facfa5ffae9329a6e9; cef330bacf014d60daabbd489647b2006af130ca
- Attacks | papers: 1db819afb3604c4bfd1e5a0cb2ee9ab9dec52642; 17bcb1edbe068e8fe6a97da552c70a77a15bbce7; 399e7d8129c60818ee208f236c8dda17e876d21f; 19443d48399d4fe89a4b0a96917c50c6fd9c5af1; 5d49c7401c5f2337c4cc88d243ae39ed659afe64; 634c083444e11c89f30c93a2986cb43db35ca304; dffe2aef88a3925b249bfe14dd0f8c7645860d64; 9f859726b3d8dffd96a1f55de4122617751cc1b4; 259d07f47c046389d0b4f256139de64736dd9a94; c4ff1be5c254b60b96b7455eefcc4ec9583f82ed; 59c2b4ef91d4ce23cd4f270c8750a00de9054ec2; 8d17234680db76f99efd22fbcb169f45d2d79d93; 2f94f03fdac62d05f0f416b7b3855d1f597afee9; 99eee47dad469790042b973bc7cb40cb63a660b1; 025ca4c125d6ecabc816a56f160e5c992abc76d9; f3f23f7f9f5369aade19f20bc5d028cce7b9c9aa; ac1788e9a168a6455beb6316f316950842297c11; 9716a2876d08fce9d8e5c5ba4d7b1a9af44806d6; ace98e1e58bcc364afbb2feff6d136232f5f47da; f3de6ea08e2464190673c0ec8f78e5ec1cd08642; bfc0e3e651cd4b715272fe68add8a180a112293c; 1104d766527dead44a40532e8a89444d9cef5c65; 6b135e922a0c673aeb0b05c5aeecdb6c794791c6; 5759d7c7038bfb7b5f1d47539c8348b04f5e0ee7; e8b3b37c0d301ea41c75765f6ceb7fcbb2e088a4; 47030369e97cc44d4b2e3cf1be85da0fd134904a; 4637f79ddfaf923ce569996ffa5b6cda1996faa1; 709af143f78bc62413c50ea1a7ee75b0702c4f59; 14e8cf5a5e6a7b35e618b08f5cf06f572b3a54e0; 263a58f4fd32caca1dad2351af4d711aec451fe6; f8a2dca1e8fe56e698984c077f7ff58d8ca867e9; 0429020abad6f22ea17681fa403aa591693bb607; b88535ea9368753c91967bb7e997c06b1ac6aaec; 512b3097ffcd6afcde6b58da1e656d5d9a635678; d1b5151231a790c7a60f620e21860593dae9a1c5; 90de1938a64d117d61b9e7149d2981df49b81433; 598df44f1d21a5d1fe3940c0bb2a6128a62c1c15; 82fe948f18ca0138d035f553286c5e4b712dbdbe; 84b7c486c56bd3880cb8eb01de9ae90ba3ebdaed; 3283764bbbd7084c9e6995e20953dbf36b25a226
- Inference-Time Attacks ) | papers: 1db819afb3604c4bfd1e5a0cb2ee9ab9dec52642; 17bcb1edbe068e8fe6a97da552c70a77a15bbce7; 399e7d8129c60818ee208f236c8dda17e876d21f; 19443d48399d4fe89a4b0a96917c50c6fd9c5af1; 5d49c7401c5f2337c4cc88d243ae39ed659afe64; 634c083444e11c89f30c93a2986cb43db35ca304; dffe2aef88a3925b249bfe14dd0f8c7645860d64; 9f859726b3d8dffd96a1f55de4122617751cc1b4; 259d07f47c046389d0b4f256139de64736dd9a94; c4ff1be5c254b60b96b7455eefcc4ec9583f82ed; 59c2b4ef91d4ce23cd4f270c8750a00de9054ec2; 8d17234680db76f99efd22fbcb169f45d2d79d93; 2f94f03fdac62d05f0f416b7b3855d1f597afee9; 99eee47dad469790042b973bc7cb40cb63a660b1; 025ca4c125d6ecabc816a56f160e5c992abc76d9; f3f23f7f9f5369aade19f20bc5d028cce7b9c9aa; ac1788e9a168a6455beb6316f316950842297c11; 9716a2876d08fce9d8e5c5ba4d7b1a9af44806d6; ace98e1e58bcc364afbb2feff6d136232f5f47da; f3de6ea08e2464190673c0ec8f78e5ec1cd08642; bfc0e3e651cd4b715272fe68add8a180a112293c; 1104d766527dead44a40532e8a89444d9cef5c65; 6b135e922a0c673aeb0b05c5aeecdb6c794791c6; 5759d7c7038bfb7b5f1d47539c8348b04f5e0ee7; e8b3b37c0d301ea41c75765f6ceb7fcbb2e088a4; 47030369e97cc44d4b2e3cf1be85da0fd134904a; 4637f79ddfaf923ce569996ffa5b6cda1996faa1; 709af143f78bc62413c50ea1a7ee75b0702c4f59; 14e8cf5a5e6a7b35e618b08f5cf06f572b3a54e0; 263a58f4fd32caca1dad2351af4d711aec451fe6; f8a2dca1e8fe56e698984c077f7ff58d8ca867e9

- Templated-Based Attacks | papers: 9f859726b3d8dffd96a1f55de4122617751cc1b4; 259d07f47c046389d0b4f256139de64736dd9a94; c4ff1be5c254b60b96b7455eefcc4ec9583f82ed; 59c2b4ef91d4ce23cd4f270c8750a00de9054ec2; 8d17234680db76f99efd22fbcb169f45d2d79d93; 2f94f03fdac62d05f0f416b7b3855d1f597afee9; 99eee47dad469790042b973bc7cb40cb63a660b1; 025ca4c125d6ecabc816a56f160e5c992abc76d9; f3f23f7f9f5369aade19f20bc5d028cce7b9c9aa; ac1788e9a168a6455beb6316f316950842297c11; 9716a2876d08fce9d8e5c5ba4d7b1a9af44806d6; ace98e1e58bcc364afbb2feff6d136232f5f47da; f3de6ea08e2464190673c0ec8f78e5ec1cd08642; bfc0e3e651cd4b715272fe68add8a180a112293c; 1104d766527dead44a40532e8a89444d9cef5c65; 6b135e922a0c673aeb0b05c5aeecdb6c794791c6; 5759d7c7038bfb7b5f1d47539c8348b04f5e0ee7; e8b3b37c0d301ea41c75765f6ceb7fcbb2e088a4; 47030369e97cc44d4b2e3cf1be85da0fd134904a

- Training-Time Attacks | papers: 0429020abad6f22ea17681fa403aa591693bb607; b88535ea9368753c91967bb7e997c06b1ac6aaec; 512b3097ffcd6afcde6b58da1e656d5d9a635678; d1b5151231a790c7a60f620e21860593dae9a1c5; 90de1938a64d117d61b9e7149d2981df49b81433; 598df44f1d21a5d1fe3940c0bb2a6128a62c1c15; 82fe948f18ca0138d035f553286c5e4b712dbdbe; 84b7c486c56bd3880cb8eb01de9ae90ba3ebdaed; 3283764bbbd7084c9e6995e20953dbf36b25a226
- LLM Unalignment | papers: 0429020abad6f22ea17681fa403aa591693bb607; b88535ea9368753c91967bb7e997c06b1ac6aaec; 512b3097ffcd6afcde6b58da1e656d5d9a635678; d1b5151231a790c7a60f620e21860593dae9a1c5; 90de1938a64d117d61b9e7149d2981df49b81433; 598df44f1d21a5d1fe3940c0bb2a6128a62c1c15; 82fe948f18ca0138d035f553286c5e4b712dbdbe; 84b7c486c56bd3880cb8eb01de9ae90ba3ebdaed; 3283764bbbd7084c9e6995e20953dbf36b25a226
- Defenses | papers: 9f859726b3d8dffd96a1f55de4122617751cc1b4; a4c921bdef167ae54cc3a40643e6e3ed13d49a61; 9ec29a26336f043a705ac99baa04c8d7f69fe4b4; 0f7308fbcae43d22813f70c334c2425df0b1cce1; 92930ed3560ea6c86d53cf52158bc793b089054d; 163b4d6a79a5b19af88b8585456363340d9efd04; d766bffc357127e0dc86dd69561d5aeb520d6f4c; 0d1c76d45afa012ded7ab741194baf142117c495; 104b0bb1da562d53cbda87aec79ef6a2827d191a; e2e52461194bc81351da7caa978ac42e9e9549cc; 59207e9d0cd4129b6ed665205105192dd3032ff3; b574245f3db22b5eb7fe64bd8b0a147dab467b60; 2cdd5c3dc42c0df40bc8839709869af3560d4bfe; 6b135e922a0c673aeb0b05c5aeecdb6c794791c6; e92e8ff1becb9a9e4a7dd09878eaacb2a62ffb6b; b8b8d5655df1c6a71bbb713387863e34cc055332; c1d1842e08716cbf7250167969522a1705d8bcd3; 3e30a7ac4886b28eb50151f58e14a1d698cccd0e; 1ab91d6ac7afc1a0121487a9089fa70edc1634d4; 8cf9b49698fdb1b754df2556576412a7b44929f6; 6fa338adac35e556e49cbb6020f13dcef4956a74; 098370508aaf56f718a472511987ac2072d0f917; 1b220b8d9e43035e334ea16e36a2685a1d092b88; 972706306f85b1bfb40c7d35c796ad5174eb0c9c; b5a624da64475d735f0e298dc6f2f6669b5bb697; b69aa32ee52f5efe8e3196114581ac610da8a2b2; e39b586e561b36a3b71fa3d9ee7cb15c35d84203; ecdfc556828dc59d8a0009016fcbe97a06cf7e23; 3fa4d63e0194cdbd909c579456830e0a7c909242; 6f35b070c250507dbec8a7365cf01b25eb66d792
- LLM Safety Alignment | papers: 9f859726b3d8dffd96a1f55de4122617751cc1b4; a4c921bdef167ae54cc3a40643e6e3ed13d49a61; 9ec29a26336f043a705ac99baa04c8d7f69fe4b4; 0f7308fbcae43d22813f70c334c2425df0b1cce1; 92930ed3560ea6c86d53cf52158bc793b089054d; 163b4d6a79a5b19af88b8585456363340d9efd04; d766bffc357127e0dc86dd69561d5aeb520d6f4c; 0d1c76d45afa012ded7ab741194baf142117c495; 104b0bb1da562d53cbda87aec79ef6a2827d191a; e2e52461194bc81351da7caa978ac42e9e9549cc; 59207e9d0cd4129b6ed665205105192dd3032ff3

- Input/Output Filters | papers: b8b8d5655df1c6a71bbb713387863e34cc055332; c1d1842e08716cbf7250167969522a1705d8bcd3; 3e30a7ac4886b28eb50151f58e14a1d698cccd0e; 1ab91d6ac7afc1a0121487a9089fa70edc1634d4; 8cf9b49698fdb1b754df2556576412a7b44929f6; 6fa338adac35e556e49cbb6020f13dcef4956a74; 098370508aaf56f718a472511987ac2072d0f917; 1b220b8d9e43035e334ea16e36a2685a1d092b88; 972706306f85b1bfb40c7d35c796ad5174eb0c9c; b5a624da64475d735f0e298dc6f2f6669b5bb697; b69aa32ee52f5efe8e3196114581ac610da8a2b2; e39b586e561b36a3b71fa3d9ee7cb15c35d84203; ecdfc556828dc59d8a0009016fcbe97a06cf7e23; 3fa4d63e0194cdbd909c579456830e0a7c909242; 6f35b070c250507dbec8a7365cf01b25eb66d792

- Model-Based Filters | papers: 6fa338adac35e556e49cbb6020f13dcef4956a74; 098370508aaf56f718a472511987ac2072d0f917; 1b220b8d9e43035e334ea16e36a2685a1d092b88; 972706306f85b1bfb40c7d35c796ad5174eb0c9c; b5a624da64475d735f0e298dc6f2f6669b5bb697; b69aa32ee52f5efe8e3196114581ac610da8a2b2; e39b586e561b36a3b71fa3d9ee7cb15c35d84203; ecdfc556828dc59d8a0009016fcbe97a06cf7e23; 3fa4d63e0194cdbd909c579456830e0a7c909242; 6f35b070c250507dbec8a7365cf01b25eb66d792
- Evaluations | papers: 9f859726b3d8dffd96a1f55de4122617751cc1b4; ea07b2e1a910defdcac01a47a152b6ad87e02ed4; da89cdeb0014666f4024f797d0c67cd45d92a7c9; 17bcb1edbe068e8fe6a97da552c70a77a15bbce7; 399e7d8129c60818ee208f236c8dda17e876d21f; 382ba0c4452aab6ecdaf8a62d567bb3c4684e4f0; 66af295963d35a203281b4e7bb902028d1c63077; 77d956cdab4508d569ae5741549b78e715fd0749; ace98e1e58bcc364afbb2feff6d136232f5f47da; 0794333779d775abc2053052d1e7009066cbd4f1; 041c4a3932eae3931d90b1a0fc033cf5f491c267; 9b9a4fa3ed510fc6eb1bf831979235f3d9f8b556; 47030369e97cc44d4b2e3cf1be85da0fd134904a; 4637f79ddfaf923ce569996ffa5b6cda1996faa1; 972706306f85b1bfb40c7d35c796ad5174eb0c9c; 60b05f32c32519a809f21642ef1eb3eaf3848008; d7da009f457917aa381619facfa5ffae9329a6e9; cef330bacf014d60daabbd489647b2006af130ca; e8b3b37c0d301ea41c75765f6ceb7fcbb2e088a4
- Safety Datasets | papers: 9f859726b3d8dffd96a1f55de4122617751cc1b4; ea07b2e1a910defdcac01a47a152b6ad87e02ed4; da89cdeb0014666f4024f797d0c67cd45d92a7c9; 17bcb1edbe068e8fe6a97da552c70a77a15bbce7; 399e7d8129c60818ee208f236c8dda17e876d21f; 382ba0c4452aab6ecdaf8a62d567bb3c4684e4f0; 66af295963d35a203281b4e7bb902028d1c63077; 77d956cdab4508d569ae5741549b78e715fd0749; ace98e1e58bcc364afbb2feff6d136232f5f47da; 0794333779d775abc2053052d1e7009066cbd4f1; 041c4a3932eae3931d90b1a0fc033cf5f491c267; 9b9a4fa3ed510fc6eb1bf831979235f3d9f8b556; 47030369e97cc44d4b2e3cf1be85da0fd134904a
- Topics \& Formulations | papers: 9f859726b3d8dffd96a1f55de4122617751cc1b4; ea07b2e1a910defdcac01a47a152b6ad87e02ed4; da89cdeb0014666f4024f797d0c67cd45d92a7c9; 17bcb1edbe068e8fe6a97da552c70a77a15bbce7; 399e7d8129c60818ee208f236c8dda17e876d21f; 382ba0c4452aab6ecdaf8a62d567bb3c4684e4f0; 66af295963d35a203281b4e7bb902028d1c63077; 77d956cdab4508d569ae5741549b78e715fd0749; ace98e1e58bcc364afbb2feff6d136232f5f47da; 0794333779d775abc2053052d1e7009066cbd4f1; 041c4a3932eae3931d90b1a0fc033cf5f491c267; 9b9a4fa3ed510fc6eb1bf831979235f3d9f8b556; 47030369e97cc44d4b2e3cf1be85da0fd134904a
- Metrics | papers: 4637f79ddfaf923ce569996ffa5b6cda1996faa1; da89cdeb0014666f4024f797d0c67cd45d92a7c9; 399e7d8129c60818ee208f236c8dda17e876d21f; 972706306f85b1bfb40c7d35c796ad5174eb0c9c; 60b05f32c32519a809f21642ef1eb3eaf3848008; d7da009f457917aa381619facfa5ffae9329a6e9; cef330bacf014d60daabbd489647b2006af130ca; ace98e1e58bcc364afbb2feff6d136232f5f47da; 9b9a4fa3ed510fc6eb1bf831979235f3d9f8b556; e8b3b37c0d301ea41c75765f6ceb7fcbb2e088a4; 47030369e97cc44d4b2e3cf1be85da0fd134904a
- Attack Success Rate \& Other Fine-Grained Metrics | papers: 4637f79ddfaf923ce569996ffa5b6cda1996faa1; da89cdeb0014666f4024f797d0c67cd45d92a7c9; 399e7d8129c60818ee208f236c8dda17e876d21f; 972706306f85b1bfb40c7d35c796ad5174eb0c9c; 60b05f32c32519a809f21642ef1eb3eaf3848008; d7da009f457917aa381619facfa5ffae9329a6e9; cef330bacf014d60daabbd489647b2006af130ca; ace98e1e58bcc364afbb2feff6d136232f5f47da; 9b9a4fa3ed510fc6eb1bf831979235f3d9f8b556; e8b3b37c0d301ea41c75765f6ceb7fcbb2e088a4; 47030369e97cc44d4b2e3cf1be85da0fd134904a
